properties.name: max
properties.description: Sets the maximum time the user can set

properties.name: min
properties.description: Sets the minimum time the user can set

properties.name: minutes-step
properties.description: Sets the step between minites in the Time Picker

properties.name: seconds-step
properties.description: Sets the step between seconds (and activate seconds) in the Time Picker

properties.name: value
properties.description: Sets the current value of the Time Picker

events.name: input
events.description: Emitted when the time is changed by the user.

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the time is changed by the user.

events.name: clear-click
events.description: Event emitted when the clear button is clicked.

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: Add rich content as the Time Picker's helper text

slots.name: contextual-help
slots.description: Allows you to add the [Contextual Help](/components/contextual-help/) component to be displayed next to the label.
